name: propertypilot
description: Full-stack property management web app for small residential landlords. React + TypeScript + Node.js + PostgreSQL, deployed on Render.

scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && dotenv -e ../.env -- prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.demo: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run dev
scripts.e2e:install: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
